mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_name, supplier_type, ceo_name, address, contract_file, note, created_at FROM suppliers ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_name, supplier_type, ceo_name, address, contract_file, note) VALUES (#{supplier_name}, #{supplier_type}, #{ceo_name}, #{address}, #{contract_file}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE suppliers SET supplier_name = #{supplier_name}, supplier_type = #{supplier_type}, ceo_name = #{ceo_name}, address = #{address}, note = #{note} WHERE id = #{id}
